description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named '🧪 Test' with read permission to repository contents and write permission to pull requests. The workflow triggers on push and pull request events to the master branch. It runs a matrix job with multiple Python versions and operating systems, checking out the repository, setting up Python, installing build prerequisites, creating a virtual environment, testing with tox, and uploading artifacts. Additionally, it runs a quality job on ubuntu-latest to perform various quality checks.
